fields.name: Render Data
fields.definition:
Shader type selects type of chud shader to render with
External Inputs are how widgets get game values.
Custom values are a palette of values to optionally supply as outputs
Output values are what actually pipes into the shader.  you can output
external or custom values
scissor rect defines the clip region of the box

fields.name: positions#As offsets from the previous one

options: <progression toast> current progress{<achievement toast> current progress}
<progression toast> sequence index{<achievement toast> sequence index}
<scripted object> recent body damage{<scripted object> recent damage}
<megalo omni widget> augmentation icon sequence index
campaign ft possible action obj dist#meters
campaign ft pending target obj dist#meters
campaign ft current target obj dist#meters
Invert condition#Check if the condition is false
<scripted object> taken recent body damage{<scripted object> taken recent damage}
fireteam current target object{fireteam current target obert}
extend#Use the final datasource position offset over and over
center#Center the elements around the first position using the second position as the offset between them
evenly space#Evenly space elements between the first two positions
reverse#Iterate over the datasource in reverse order
tracking objects#projectiles tracking the current player
scale alpha by col. out A
